# Five Habits for Better Sleep

Sleep is one of the most powerful levers for everyday wellbeing. None of the
suggestions below are clinical advice — they're commonly cited habits.

## 1. Keep a consistent schedule

Going to bed and waking up at roughly the same time every day, including
weekends, helps your circadian rhythm settle.

## 2. Limit caffeine after noon

Caffeine's half-life is several hours, so a 4pm coffee can still be in your
system at midnight.

## 3. Get morning sunlight

A 10-minute walk shortly after waking signals to your body that the day has
started.
